mapper.select: SELECT symbol, period_date AS periodDate, fiscal_year AS fiscalYear, fiscal_quarter AS fiscalQuarter, actual, estimate, surprise, surprise_percent AS surprisePercent, raw_json AS rawJson, fetched_at AS fetchedAt FROM stock_eps_surprise WHERE symbol = #{symbol} ORDER BY period_date DESC LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO stock_eps_surprise ( symbol, period_date, fiscal_year, fiscal_quarter, actual, estimate, surprise, surprise_percent, raw_json, fetched_at ) VALUES
( #{item.symbol}, #{item.periodDate}, #{item.fiscalYear}, #{item.fiscalQuarter}, #{item.actual}, #{item.estimate}, #{item.surprise}, #{item.surprisePercent}, #{item.rawJson}, #{item.fetchedAt} )
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE fiscal_year = VALUES(fiscal_year), fiscal_quarter = VALUES(fiscal_quarter), actual = VALUES(actual), estimate = VALUES(estimate), surprise = VALUES(surprise), surprise_percent = VALUES(surprise_percent), raw_json = VALUES(raw_json), fetched_at = VALUES(fetched_at)
